creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #9)
I think the author is aware of the issue (see https://github.com/MayaPosch/NymphRPC/issues/9, the last commenter is the repo owner). It's already fixed in the latest upstream (https://github.com/MayaPosch/NymphRPC/blob/9df6ebf2fc343daca229dc72b0d0696968a13fc4/Makefile#L117). I think the owner just needs to create a new release.
